name: disk-cleaner
description: macOS Disk Cleaner — Find duplicates, large files, and reclaim disk space

scripts.build:main: esbuild src/main/index.ts src/main/ipc.ts src/main/scanner.ts --outdir=dist/main --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --minify && esbuild src/main/preload.ts --bundle --outdir=dist/main --platform=node --target=node18 --format=cjs --minify --external:electron
scripts.obfuscate:main: for f in dist/main/*.js; do javascript-obfuscator "$f" --output "$f" --compact true --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-rotate true --string-array-shuffle true --dead-code-injection false --self-defending false; done
scripts.obfuscate:renderer: for f in dist/renderer/assets/index-*.js; do javascript-obfuscator "$f" --output "$f" --compact true --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-rotate true --string-array-shuffle true --dead-code-injection false --self-defending false; done
scripts.build: bun run typecheck && bun run build:renderer && bun run build:main && bun run obfuscate:main && bun run obfuscate:renderer
